taskTitle: Study the six pillars of Iman
subtaskTitle: Study belief in the Last Day (al-Yawm al-Akhir)
csQueryPrompt: For a MILOS subtask titled 'Study belief in the Last Day (al-Yawm al-Akhir)' under the parent task 'Study the six pillars of Iman' (module: faith_shahada_core), propose exactly 2 NotebookLM queries to a Quran/Hadith primary-source corpus: (1) Quran-biased — name likely primary ayat that directly or contextually anchor this subtask; (2) Hadith-biased — name likely Sahih hadith (Bukhari/Muslim preferred) that directly or contextually anchor this subtask. Return the queries inside a <queries></queries> block as a numbered list, each one sentence, ready to paste into a retrieval system. Do NOT answer the queries — query formulation only.
extractedQueries: What are the primary ayat, such as Surah Al-Baqarah 2:177 or Surah Al-Hajj 22:7, that directly mandate and contextualize belief in the Last Day (al-Yawm al-Akhir) as a core theological anchor?
Which authentic narrations, particularly the Hadith of Jibril from Sahih al-Bukhari and Sahih Muslim, explicitly detail the belief in the Last Day as one of the definitive six pillars of Iman?
